violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
Establishment is lacking a handwashing sink in the kitchen. PIC informed and must provide proof of installation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the staff bathroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The hand-washing sink in the staff bathroom was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC moved to 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
(Food product and beverages ) were observed stored on the floor in the (kitchen ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (cooking equipment shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The door to the (kitchen) toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The (floors) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed damage and missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025
